positive: Minimalist celestial forest gathering. A lone, stylized lunar fox with glowing blue fur sits amongst oversized bioluminescent flora and crystal shards. The background is a deep indigo gradient, transitioning to soft teal. Composition should be centered, featuring strong negative space around the main subject. Use clean, graphic silhouettes and intricate linework reminiscent of Art Nouveau combined with modern vaporwave aesthetics. Dramatic rim lighting from the magical flora, high contrast, ethereal glow, vector art style, tattoo flash aesthetic, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, text, logo, signature, watermark, artifact, noise, messy, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, grain, realistic photo
